description_long: This is an adult male figure with a medium build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides. He is dressed in a short-sleeved shirt and knee-length shorts, both of which appear loose-fitting and casual. The figure is barefoot, with defined toes and feet, and wears a single wristband or sweatband on his right wrist. His facial features are simple, with short, neatly styled hair and no visible facial hair. The overall appearance suggests a relaxed, everyday pedestrian suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks or parks. The model's proportions and attire indicate a typical adult male engaged in casual outdoor activity.
description: A casually dressed adult male standing with arms outstretched, wearing a short-sleeved shirt, shorts, and a wristband, barefoot and with short hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, outstretched arms, and the wristband on the right wrist.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the shirt's fit, and the bare feet.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear of the head, back, and both arms extended, with the wristband visible on the right wrist.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the wristband, the side of the face, and the relaxed posture.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved shirt and knee-length shorts with a wristband accessory
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
